title: adenocarpus lainzii
intro: Adenocarpus lainzii, also known as the white broom, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub with white flowers and a woody stem, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Adenocarpus lainzii include its use as a diuretic and to treat various urinary issues, such as kidney stones and infections, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. Adenocarpus lainzii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving kidney function.
